title: Principal Radiologist at Philips India Healthcare

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Philips India Healthcare
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Philips India Healthcare in Agra offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Philips India Healthcare:
Philips India Healthcare is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Philips India Healthcare!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
